main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'arranque con aclarado insuficiente + ramp-up rapido + arrastre conservante' matches

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals (ORP -10, glicerina 320, 1x30 vs 3x60, ramp 5min, caudal 70%, dP 1.5/0.9)

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (mojado/compactacion, baja A intrinseca, O-rings) bien descartadas

recommended_action.justification: C4: aislar + 3 aclarados 60min sin oxidantes + ramp 30 min - matches gold completo

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (sulfito feed, no oxidantes, cond+rechazo monitoring + 4-6h trigger)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: sulfito<0.1 + ORP>+50 + glicerina<50 + caudal/rechazo anomalo -> defecto

reviewer_notes: Excelente, cubre 3 hipotesis incluyendo compactacion normal
